extraction.one_line_summary: DANESE Alberto won a photo finish sprint by a tire width over Milan after Sennaert's 192km breakaway was caught at 5km to go.
tactical_patterns: Milan prevented Matthews joining breakaway citing sprint threat, then Matthews still nearly beat Milan from way-out launch.
GC teams including Ineos held position until exactly 3km mark, suggesting pre-race agreement on safety protocol timing.
Jayco-AlUla successfully led out Matthews against bigger pure sprinters through technical finale positioning him competitively.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: competitive with pure sprinters Milan/Danese despite being puncheur type, launched from distance in technical finish
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: negative: secured maglia ciclamino mathematically but lost two photo finishes showing positioning weakness in chaotic sprints
rider_signals.SENNAERT Lasse: neutral: solo 192km effort caught 5km out confirms breakaway futility on flat sprint stages
